name: TemplateInfo
summary: The TemplateInfo class holds template information.

constructors.name: TemplateInfo
constructors.summary: Creates a new template info instance.

constructors.name: TemplateInfo
constructors.summary: Creates a new template info instance with the given template file name.

params.name: TemplateFile
params.doc: The template file name to be used.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the template file. E.g. "revision".
